channel.title: SevenAtSevenSportsAndEntertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SevenAtSevenSportsAndEntertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Radio Host Mistakenly Says Dick Van Dyke Died, Not James Van Der Beek
item.description: Dick Van Dyke is still alive, despite one on-air mix up. Amid the tragic news of James Van Der Beek’s death at the age of 48, Pussycat Dolls alum Ashl...

item.title: Kelsea Ballerini Debuts Subtle Hair Change After Chase Stokes Breakup
item.description: Kelsea Ballerini is switching up her patterns. The “Cowboys Cry Too” singer showed off a new hairdo during New York Fashion Week Feb. 12, her first pu...

item.title: How Margot Robbie, Jacob Elordi Did Intimate Wuthering Heights Scenes
item.description: Heathcliff and Catherine might be toxic, but Margot Robbie and Jacob Elordi are not slippin’ under. Ahead of Emerald Fennell’s Wuthering Heights hitti...

item.title: Inside Margot Robbie and Husband Tom Ackerley's Epic Love Story
item.description: Margot Robbie channeled her teenage self to reach the emotional depths felt by the tempestuous Cathy in Wuthering Heights. "You know, when my hormones...

item.title: Mr. Fantasy Describes His Dream Date With Jenna Ortega
item.description: Mr. Fantasy is hoping to one day live out his own fantasy with Jenna Ortega. The artist—who fans speculate is the musical alter ego of 28-year-old act...

item.title: Lou Young Urges Men Not to Blow Their Rent on Pricey Valentine's Day Gifts
item.description: Valentine’s Day is creeping up ... and while couples are busy emptying their wallets, Lou Young is waving a financial red flag. We caught up with Lou ...

item.title: Spike In 'Notting Hill' 'Memba Him?!
item.description: Welsh actor Rhys Ifans was in his early 30s when he played Spike -- the socially awkward flatmate, championing for his roommate to confess his love to...

item.title: PINK VS. RED: Ladies in Lacy-Hot Lingerie Who'd You Rather?!
item.description: Pink or red -- either way, these ladies are turning up the heat and making it extremely hard to choose ... Check out these BAD 'N BOLD bods in eye-cat...

item.title: Rep. Jake Auchincloss Tells Fellow Members of Congress to 'Touch Grass'
item.description: Representative Jake Auchincloss says politicians need to ditch their phones and get in touch with nature ... telling us most are nice IRL -- but they ...

item.title: Donna Kelce Refuses To Pressure Travis As NFL Future Hangs In Balance
item.description: Travis Kelce’s NFL future is hanging in the balance … and Mama Kelce says the final call belongs to him! Donna Kelce tells TMZ Sports she’s giving her...

item.title: The Lincoln Lawyer’s Season 4 Character Death Pays Tribute To George Clooney's 3-Part Crime Thriller
